checklist_items.item_text: Access to all core Shadcn UI blocks

faq_items.question: 1. What services does your web agency offer?
faq_items.answer: We provide end-to-end digital solutions including website design, development, branding, UI/UX, eCommerce platforms, and ongoing optimization to help businesses scale effectively.

faq_items.question: 2. How long does it take to build a website?
faq_items.answer: Project timelines typically range from 4–8 weeks depending on complexity, features, and feedback cycles. We prioritize both speed and quality to ensure exceptional results.

faq_items.question: 3. Do you create custom designs or use templates?
faq_items.answer: Every brand is unique, which is why we primarily design custom experiences tailored to your goals, audience, and identity — ensuring your website stands out.

faq_items.question: 4. Can you help maintain and update our website?
faq_items.answer: Yes — we offer ongoing support, security updates, performance monitoring, and feature enhancements so your website continues to evolve with your business.

faq_items.question: What services do you offer?
faq_items.answer: We offer a wide range of services including web development, app development, and digital marketing.

faq_items.question: How long does a typical project take?
faq_items.answer: The time it takes to complete a project depends on the complexity of the project and the scope of the work.

faq_items.question: What industries do you work with?
faq_items.answer: We work with startups, e-commerce brands, tech companies, real estate, healthcare, creators, and corporate clients. If you have a business, we can design for it.

faq_items.question: Do you offer custom designs or use templates?
faq_items.answer: Absolutely! We offer comprehensive post-launch support to ensure a seamless implementation and provide ongoing maintenance packages tailored to clients who need regular updates or technical assistance. Our commitment doesn't end at launch — we're here to help you every step of the way.

faq_items.question: How much do your services cost?
faq_items.answer: We provide updates on a regular basis to ensure that your project is running smoothly and that you are aware of any changes or updates to the project.

faq_items.question: Can I request revisions?
faq_items.answer: Yes, we offer post-launch support and maintenance packages to help you with ongoing updates, technical assistance, and any modifications you may need after your website or app goes live.

faq_items.question: How much does a typical project cost?
faq_items.answer: Pricing varies based on scope and requirements, but we focus on delivering measurable value. After understanding your needs, we provide transparent, tailored proposals.

faq_items.question: Do you work with startups or only established companies?
faq_items.answer: The time it takes to complete a project depends on the complexity of the project and the scope of the work.

faq_items.question: What makes your agency different?
faq_items.answer: Pricing is based on the complexity of the project and the scope of the work.

faq_items.question: Will my website be optimized for SEO and performance?
faq_items.answer: Absolutely! We offer comprehensive post-launch support to ensure a seamless implementation and provide ongoing maintenance packages tailored to clients who need regular updates or technical assistance. Our commitment doesn't end at launch — we're here to help you every step of the way.

faq_items.question: How long does it take to build a website?
faq_items.answer: We provide updates on a regular basis to ensure that your project is running smoothly and that you are aware of any changes or updates to the project.
